summary: Python code is well-structured (dataclasses, type hints, error handling), but workflow is fatally incomplete and poorly designed. CRITICAL: Workflow references fixture files (tc1_age_policy.json–tc5_dry_run.json) and .actrc that are not provided; cannot execute. Workflow design is repetitive: each fixture-tests step runs the same command 5–6 times (e.g., TC1 lines 35–41 repeat 'python3 artifact_cleanup.py --fixture fixtures/tc1_age_policy.json' verbatim, then grep different assertions). Should run once per fixture, capture output, validate all assertions against it. Adds new maintainability burden: each test case addition requires copy-pasting 5+ lines with high copy-paste-error risk. Run_act_tests.py harness is sound but not shippable without fixture data. Not production-ready.
